openingThird.focus: Keep camp handoff and retreat pressure bound to hide, timber, bone-country, and bodily failure.

middleThird.focus: Keep shipboard framework talk tied to rope, mast, deck roll, blood, and sail labor.

finalThird.focus: Keep village normalcy, palace geometry, and threshold entry concrete instead of slogan or tactical note shorthand.

scenes.title: The Handoff
scenes.biggestGap: Muradin handoff briefly lifts from hide, flap, and healer noise into metaphor and evaluative retreat summary.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Improvised dwarven camp in a snowfold below Muradin's wall, then bone-country retreat through Dragonblight.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Hide flap, bucket noise, forge heat falling away, dragon ribs, crusted snow, sled grooves.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina keeps hearing Frostmourne's hitch through bootfall rhythm even while leaving Muradin behind.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Baelgun's camp orders stay attached to stretcher work, cold, and immediate departure pressure.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Retreat should end on exposed distance, bad footing, and continuing seam-work rather than abstract verdict.

scenes.title: The Return March
scenes.biggestGap: The seam breakthrough lands through metaphor and summary instead of observable transition state, protective spacing, and bodily failure.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Open dragon graveyard retreat with no cover and a visible switchback down to the bay.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Snow crust, drifting powder, boots catching in frozen grooves, shaking wrists, horse gear waiting below.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina thinks in field states and spell sequence, but the body paying for that thought must stay on page.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Breakthrough exchange should sit inside halted file spacing and Cyndia's protective lane adjustment.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Arrival at the cliffs must land through knees, steps, and harbor sightline, not choice-language abstraction.

scenes.title: Daggercap and the Crossing
scenes.biggestGap: Framework dialogue briefly opens in atmospheric language and pre-answers its own turn instead of letting deck reality hold the pause.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Ruined harbor callback into hard-driven southbound schooner deck.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Rope coil, mast knock, hull slap, blood on planks, rail slick with spray.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina keeps reducing theory into field language because there is no strength left for ornament.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: The 'who buys the seconds' question must ride on rope bite, held silence, and deck motion.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Landfall remains body-first: knees giving, dock tilt, immediate remount.

scenes.title: The Road South
scenes.biggestGap: Sylvanas's village read briefly compresses false normalcy into slogan instead of civic objects and public markers.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Harvest-dressed villages along the King's Road under false peacetime routine.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Garlands, ribbons, painted boards, brass cylinder heat, flour on aprons.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads celebration as operational obstruction and measures road math against Jaina's reserves.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Runner and Antonidas exchanges stay tied to reins, stone-light, road pace, and rider posture.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Approach should carry parade residue and tightening road geometry straight into the city.

scenes.title: The Plan and the Capital
scenes.biggestGap: Throne-room read momentarily turns schematic; it needs embodied sightline pressure through Sylvanas's body instead of note fragments.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Eastern service arch and palace back corridors opening toward the throne room's exposed marble.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Cold mortar, lock plate, service door crack, parade residue, palace stone.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads angles, line breaks, and exposure as bodily timing problem, not abstract plan language.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Antonidas and plan talk stay pinned to arch stone, ward-softening, and listener reactions.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Service-door closure must sever the last public lane in concrete sensory terms.
